title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 took place on June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco, featuring keynote sessions and main-stage programming throughout the day. The event was streamed online by AI Engineer, covering one of the largest gatherings in AI engineering.
writeup: This video is the Day 1 stream of the AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. It captures the day's keynote sessions and main-stage programming from one of the largest gatherings focused on AI engineering. The recording serves as a full-day archive of the conference proceedings as streamed by the AI Engineer channel.
